text: You test your wit against the old ones and you prevail after 3 days. You have finally managed to open up the odd shaped box a little, but what comes out is just some black mist. It’s only now as out fall to your knees coughing uncontrollably that you realize that it was something evil sealed in it. Your last thought was “oops” as disease and pestilence sweeps the city. [New Game]
